text.first: Here you can find everything you need about GTA games: Information, news, all the cheats and essential mods for your game, interactive maps to collect items while you play, all available radio stations to listen to any time, curiosities, and much more.
text.second: Content updates every week! Feel free to visit often and add the page to your favorites (or even install it as a standalone app!)

first.title: beach_access About Vice Club
first.q1: What can I find on Vice Club?
first.a1: On Vice Club you will find all the information related to each main game in the GTA franchise. You will have access to all cheats, radio stations, interactive maps, mods, news, and much more.
first.q2: How do I search for information by game?
first.a2: Very simple. Just tap on the menu in the top right, and you can choose the game you want to look up. To return to this home page, simply tap the Vice Club logo in the top left.
first.q3: How did Vice Club come to be?
first.a3: Vice Club started as a personal web development project that I began planning in early 2025. It seemed like a great way to practice my front-end development skills while building a website dedicated to one of my favorite video game franchises.
first.q4: How often is the content updated?
first.a4: I promise to bring more information and content every week until I finish my tasks.
first.q5: Can I suggest content, report a bug, or simply contribute to the development?
first.a5: Of course! Vice Club is open source and its repository can be found on GitHub.

second.title: person About me
second.a1: My name is Sebastián. I am an Argentine front-end web developer and a huge GTA fan.
second.a2: You can send me an email or reach me on GitHub.
second.a3: Without any doubt, San Andreas. For everything it meant and continues to mean more than 20 years after its release. Honorable mentions to the best story in the franchise (GTA 4) and the best atmosphere (GTA Vice City).

index.support: Vice Club is a 100% free project, made with a lot of love for the entire franchise. If you enjoy it and want to support the development, you can buy me a coffee:

text.first: Grand Theft Auto III is an open-world action and sandbox video game developed by DMA Design (now Rockstar North) and published by Rockstar Games, released on October 23, 2001. It is the first Grand Theft Auto with a third-person and 3D perspective, setting a precedent in the series.
text.second: The game takes place in Liberty City, a fictional city based on New York. It features 3 main islands: Portland, Staunton Island and Shoreside Vale, which are unlocked progressively as the story advances.
text.third: The player takes control of Claude, a man who was arrested for robbing the Liberty City Bank, where he was betrayed by his partner at the time, Catalina, who shot him at the crime scene. Claude must carry out missions for contacts in the Leone mafia, working his way up through various gangs, organizations and crews. The story features a total of 50 missions.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City is an open-world action-adventure sandbox video game developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games, released on October 29, 2002.
text.second: The game takes place in Vice City, a fictional city based on and parodying Miami, in the year 1986.
text.third: The player takes control of Tommy Vercetti, a man who has just been released from prison after serving a 15-year sentence. He is tasked with overseeing a drug deal on behalf of the Forelli crime family. After the deal goes wrong and Sonny Forelli's money is lost, Tommy begins searching for those responsible while working for several influential figures in Vice City's criminal underworld.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas is an open-world action-adventure sandbox video game developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games, originally released on October 26, 2004, for PlayStation 2.
text.second: The game takes place in 1992, primarily in a parody of Los Angeles called Los Santos. There, the main protagonist, Carl Johnson, returns to the city for the funeral of his murdered mother after spending five years living in Liberty City.
text.third: The game stands out for its vast and diverse world. It features three major cities: Los Santos, San Fierro, and Las Venturas, as well as other large regions spread across the map, including the countryside with the counties of Whetstone, Flint County, and Red County, and the desert regions of Bone County and Tierra Robada.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: Liberty City Stories is a video game developed by Rockstar Leeds and published by Rockstar Games. It was originally released for the PlayStation Portable on October 25, 2005, and was later ported to PlayStation 2 on June 6, 2006.
text.second: The game's story takes place in 1998 in Liberty City. Players control Toni Cipriani, a criminal and member of the Leone crime family.
text.third: It is the first game in the series to feature an official multiplayer mode. It was available on PlayStation Portable through Ad-Hoc connectivity and included 7 different game modes ranging from races and deathmatches to various team-based modes. Additionally, there were more than 40 characters to choose from.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City Stories is an open-world action-adventure sandbox video game developed by Rockstar Leeds and published by Rockstar Games. It was released on October 31, 2006, for the PlayStation Portable and on March 5, 2007, for the PlayStation 2.
text.second: The game takes place two years before the events of Grand Theft Auto: Vice City and tells the story of Victor Vance and his attempt to build a criminal empire across the city alongside his brother Lance.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto IV is an open-world action-adventure sandbox video game developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games, originally released on April 29, 2008, for PlayStation 3 and Xbox 360.
text.second: The game takes place in a modern-day Liberty City, a parody of New York City, and the state of Alderney (New Jersey).
text.third: The player takes control of Niko Bellic, a Serbian war veteran who arrives in the city seeking revenge for a betrayal he suffered during the war.
text.fourth: In addition, the game introduces the mobile phone mechanic: through it, the player can receive calls from contacts to unlock missions, or make calls to participate in side activities with friends or romantic partners.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: The Lost and Damned is the first downloadable content (DLC) expansion for Grand Theft Auto IV, developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games. It was originally released exclusively for Xbox 360 on February 17, 2009, and later launched for PlayStation 3 and Microsoft Windows on April 13, 2010, as part of Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City.
text.second: In The Lost and Damned, players take control of Johnny Klebitz, vice president of The Lost Motorcycle Club. The story follows the internal conflicts within the gang as they deal with gang wars and drug trafficking.
text.third: As for new content, the game features 22 new missions, 7 new weapons, 25 new vehicles, and various activities across the map, such as gang wars, motorcycle races, and arm wrestling.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto: The Ballad of Gay Tony is the second downloadable content (DLC) expansion for Grand Theft Auto IV, developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games. It was originally released exclusively for Xbox 360 on October 29, 2009, and later launched for PlayStation 3 and Microsoft Windows on April 13, 2010, as part of Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City.
text.second: In The Ballad of Gay Tony, players take control of Luis Fernando Lopez, bodyguard and business partner of nightclub entrepreneur Anthony "Gay Tony" Prince. The story follows Tony's financial and criminal troubles while Luis tries to keep his boss's businesses afloat amid debts, gangs, and the mafia.
text.third: As for new content, the game introduces 26 new missions, exclusive weapons such as the explosive grenade launcher and the advanced sniper rifle, new vehicles, and activities including nightclub management, parachuting, and cage fighting.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto V is an open-world action-adventure sandbox video game developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games. It was originally released for PlayStation 3 and Xbox 360 on September 17, 2013. The game also received versions for eighth-generation consoles (PlayStation 4 and Xbox One) known as "Enhanced", and for ninth-generation consoles (PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S) known as "Expanded & Enhanced".
text.second: The story takes place in Los Santos, a parody of Los Angeles, and Blaine County, which represents the California desert. Players take control of three protagonists: Michael De Santa, Franklin Clinton, and Trevor Philips.
text.third: It is the second best-selling video game of all time, with 230 million copies sold to date, surpassed only by Minecraft.

text.first: Grand Theft Auto VI is the next game to be released by Rockstar Games on November 19, 2026. It represents the longest development cycle of any game in the series, with more than 13 years having passed since its predecessor.
text.second: The game takes place in the state of Leonida, a parody of the state of Florida. It will feature up to six known locations: Vice City (Miami), the Leonida Keys (Florida Keys), Grassrivers (Everglades), Port Gelhorn, Ambrosia, and Mount Kalaga.
text.third: Players will control Jason Duval and Lucia Caminos, a criminal couple who must confront a criminal conspiracy against them, relying on each other to survive.
